Employee.title: Employee
Employee.description: Represents an employee identified by their unique registration number in the external time clock system.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Employee entity.

registrationNumber.description: The employee's unique registration number (matrícula) used to access external time clock data.

uid.description: The current Firebase Auth UID linked to this registration number.

previousBalanceMonth.description: The month the initial balance refers to.

previousBalanceYear.description: The year the initial balance refers to.

balanceAdjustment.description: Manual balance adjustment for HR differences (HH:MM).

authVersion.description: The version of auth email to allow resetting passwords without Admin SDK.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the employee record was first created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the employee record was last updated.

MonthlyTimeRecord.title: MonthlyTimeRecord
MonthlyTimeRecord.description: Stores the scraped daily time clock data for a specific employee for a given month.

id.description: Unique identifier for the MonthlyTimeRecord entity.

employeeId.description: Reference to the Employee whose time record this is.

year.description: The year of the monthly time record.

month.description: The month of the monthly time record (1-12).

dailyRecords.description: An array of daily time clock entries for the month.
